title: justicia whytei
intro: Justicia whytei, also known as the White Justicia or Pusley, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Justicia whytei include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Justicia whytei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
